name: ApprovalResultHandler

neutralConcepts: second APPROVE on ACTIVE record = idempotent success

ironRules.rule: conditional update WHERE status=PENDING — not SETNX. SETNX prevents idempotent re-approval of ACTIVE records.
Second APPROVE on ACTIVE record: return success (already approved — idempotent). Do not fail or re-emit.
DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE MembershipActivated or MembershipRejected emit.

keywords: approval result handler conditional update WHERE status PENDING idempotent APPROVE ACTIVE
